summary: Fair‑quality recording of a typical high‑energy LA show, highlighted by a trippy Tennessee Jed → Cumberland Blues opening in the second set
review: The reviewer rates the sound quality at three stars – an average, somewhat muddy capture – but praises the concert itself as a classic, raucous Los Angeles performance with a rocking set list and an especially exciting second‑set opener of Tennessee Jed into Cumberland Blues. No specific technical flaws are detailed beyond the overall rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; show is described positively while recording quality is only average, leading to a moderate combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer gave the sound quality 3‑star rating but offered no detailed comments on clarity, mix balance or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Typical LA show of the era – high energy, raucous crowd, and a strong second‑set opener that got fans tripping.
